title: Candidate identity key (v2)
description: design.md 1.4: the candidate identity key is (provider, canonical_model_id, event_type, normalized_field_path, old_value -> new_value) with values canonicalized (numbers normalized, strings NFC-trimmed). The event id is minted from this key, so the same real-world change observed via different sources on different ticks resolves to the same event id.
$comment: Minting: evt_<observed_at UTC date>_<hash8>, where hash8 is the first 8 hex chars of sha256 over the canonical serialization of this object. design.md does not pin the serialization; pinned here (Phase 0 resolution) as compact JSON with lexicographically sorted keys, UTF-8, separators ',' and ':'.

canonical_model_id.description: Canonical id via registry/model-aliases.json; null for non-model-scoped events (outage.*, policy.changed)

normalized_field_path.description: Materiality-table field path of the delta

old_value.description: Canonicalized previous value (any JSON value; null for appearance events)

new_value.description: Canonicalized new value (any JSON value; null for disappearance events)
